config.description: Intent (config) surface for Vcn — the fields a caller may set.

byoipv6CidrDetails.description: The list of BYOIPv6 OCIDs and BYOIPv6 prefixes required to create a VCN that uses BYOIPv6 address ranges.

cidrBlocks.description: The list of IPv4 CIDR blocks the VCN will use.

compartmentId.description: The OCID (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/identifiers.htm) of the compartment containing the VCN.

dnsLabel.description: A DNS label for the VCN, used in conjunction with the VNIC's hostname and subnet's DNS label to form a fully qualified domain name (FQDN) for each VNIC within this subnet (for example, `bminstance1.subnet123.vcn1.oraclevcn.com`).

ipv6PrivateCidrBlocks.description: For an IPv6-enabled VCN, this is the list of Private IPv6 prefixes for the VCN's IP address space.

isIpv6Enabled.description: Whether IPv6 is enabled for the VCN.

isOracleGuaAllocationEnabled.description: Specifies whether to skip Oracle allocated IPv6 GUA.

isZprOnly.description: Indicates whether ZPR Only mode is enforced.

securityAttributes.description: Security attributes (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/zero-trust-packet-routing/zpr-artifacts.htm#security-attributes) are labels for a resource that can be referenced in a Zero Trust Packet Routing (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/zero-trust-packet-routing/overview.htm) (ZPR) policy to control access to ZPR-supported resources.

config.title: cic:network:vcn-config

state.description: Observed (state) surface for Vcn — the fields read back from the provider.

byoipv6CidrBlocks.description: The list of BYOIPv6 prefixes required to create a VCN that uses BYOIPv6 ranges.

cidrBlocks.description: The list of IPv4 CIDR blocks the VCN will use.

compartmentId.description: The OCID (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/identifiers.htm) of the compartment containing the VCN.

defaultDhcpOptionsId.description: The OCID (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/identifiers.htm) for the VCN's default set of DHCP options.

defaultRouteTableId.description: The OCID (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/identifiers.htm) for the VCN's default route table.

defaultSecurityListId.description: The OCID (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/identifiers.htm) for the VCN's default security list.

dnsLabel.description: A DNS label for the VCN, used in conjunction with the VNIC's hostname and subnet's DNS label to form a fully qualified domain name (FQDN) for each VNIC within this subnet (for example, `bminstance1.subnet123.vcn1.oraclevcn.com`).

ipv6CidrBlocks.description: For an IPv6-enabled VCN, this is the list of IPv6 prefixes for the VCN's IP address space.

ipv6PrivateCidrBlocks.description: For an IPv6-enabled VCN, this is the list of Private IPv6 prefixes for the VCN's IP address space.

isZprOnly.description: Indicates whether ZPR Only mode is enforced.

securityAttributes.description: Security attributes (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/zero-trust-packet-routing/zpr-artifacts.htm#security-attributes) are labels for a resource that can be referenced in a Zero Trust Packet Routing (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/zero-trust-packet-routing/overview.htm) (ZPR) policy to control access to ZPR-supported resources.

timeCreated.description: The date and time the VCN was created, in the format defined by RFC3339 (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3339).

vcnDomainName.description: The VCN's domain name, which consists of the VCN's DNS label, and the `oraclevcn.com` domain.

state.title: cic:network:vcn-state
